title: Nalco is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nalco is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Nalco is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nalco:
Nalco is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nalco!
